name: Voice Move All
description: Move all users from one voice channel to another.
author: Kiodium

defaults.permissionMessage: You need Move Members permission to move everyone.
defaults.botPermissionMessage: I need Move Members permission to move everyone.
defaults.sourceMessage: I could not find the source voice channel. Join a voice channel or add a Source Channel ID.
defaults.targetMessage: I could not find the target voice channel. Add a Target Channel ID in the node or command.
defaults.emptyMessage: There are no movable members in **{sourceChannel}**.
defaults.sameChannelMessage: Source and target voice channels must be different.
defaults.partialMessage: Moved **{movedCount}** users, but **{failedCount}** users could not be moved.
